title: coleus zatarhendi
intro: Coleus zatarhendi is a plant species belonging to the Lamiaceae family, commonly known as the coleus plant. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, Coleus zatarhendi is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
